summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that ATR is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $124.86. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 28.6%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $127.11 and a significant trendline confluence around $126.62 (formed by 3 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
